xh.t: abbr. extra hard 特硬的（代号）; extra heavy 特重的（代号）; extra high 特高的（代号）

xhosa.t: n. 科萨人使用的班图语；科萨人（居住在南非开普省的牧民）
xhosa.d:
n. a member of the Negroid people of southern South Africa
n. a community of Negroid people in southern South Africa
n. a Bantu language closely related to Zulu

xhosas.t: (xhosa 的复数) n. 科萨人使用的班图语；科萨人（居住在南非开普省的牧民）
xhosas.d:
plural of xhosa
n. a member of the Negroid people of southern South Africa
n. a community of Negroid people in southern South Africa
n. a Bantu language closely related to Zulu

xhtml.t: abbr. 扩展超文本标识语言（The Extensible HyperText Markup Language）；结构层代码
